name: ServiceMaster Global Holdings, Inc.
description: ServiceMaster Global Holdings, Inc. was a prominent American company that provided a variety of residential and commercial services, including pest control, cleaning, and restoration. Following a series of strategic divestitures and the sale of its core business units, the company underwent significant restructuring. Today, the organization operates as ServiceMaster Brands, a privately held entity owned by Roark Capital Group. Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, it continues to manage a portfolio of well-known service brands that support homeowners and businesses across the United States and internationally, maintaining a long-standing reputation for professional maintenance and support services.
